title: The Camera With a Million Eyes

scenes.text: Imagine a camera that can see with a million eyes!
scenes.hook_top: A CAMERA WITH A MILLION EYES

scenes.text: New technology allows for a 3,200-megapixel camera to capture stunning detail.
This camera can capture 700 images every night in exquisite quality.
Such advancements reveal details of distant galaxies and phenomena.
scenes.label: REVEALING THE UNSEEN

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: A camera with 3,200 megapixels can capture 700 images every night, revealing distant galaxies. Follow for more on technology breakthroughs!
